off-by-one buffer overflow in safe string copy|buffer overflow|cwe-193|medium|0,9|enhanced_calc.cpp|203|205|string_utils::safe_string_copy|if (src_len > dest_size) src_len = dest_size; memcpy(dest, src, src_len); dest[src_len] = '\0';|out-of-bounds write corrupting adjacent stack memory.|source string length exactly equals destination buffer size|limit copy to dest_size - 1 to reserve space for null terminator.->off-by-one buffer overflow in safe string copy|buffer overflow|cwe-193|medium|0,9|enhanced_calc.cpp|203|205|string_utils::safe_string_copy|if (src_len > dest_size) src_len = dest_size; memcpy(dest, src, src_len); dest[src_len] = '\0';|out-of-bounds write corrupting adjacent stack memory.|source string length exactly equals destination buffer size|limit copy to dest_size - 1 to reserve space for null terminator.

truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 findings against the 20 true vulnerabilities. Run 2 correctly identified 8 true vulnerabilities, partially identified 1 (misclassifying heap as stack), and missed 11. It also reported 4 findings outside the true vulnerability set, some of which were overclaimed or mischaracterized relative to the source code.

Items.Notes: Directly matches the format-string injection via runtime log format vulnerability.
Integer overflow in factorial computation was not identified in Run 2.
Use-after-free during deferred history flush and pool cleanup was not identified.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: std::string command = validator_cmd + " " + config_file; int result = system(command.c_str());
Items.Notes: Directly matches command injection via config validation.
Directly matches stack buffer overflow in input processing.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: long long old_value = value_; std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_); value_ = old_value + 1;
Items.Notes: Directly matches race condition in thread-pool counter.
Logic bomb via emergency override authentication bypass was not identified.
Path traversal in configuration loading was not identified.
Identified the buffer overflow but misclassified it as stack-based; source explicitly allocates on heap via memory pool.
Directly matches hardcoded administrator credentials.
Weak PRNG for session tokens was not identified.
Directly matches thread-unsafe timestamp cache in logging.
Insecure temporary file handling was not identified.
Persistent authentication state was not identified.
Unhandled exception in variable parsing was not identified.
Integer underflow in memory-pool block split was not identified.
Unbounded recursion in parser was not identified.
Data race in result cache was not identified.
TOCTOU in config loading was not identified.
Integer division by zero in command routing was not identified.
